Legendary Stand

The World — Bizarre Lineage

DIO's iconic Stand. Time Stop combined with raw destructive power makes it a top-tier PvP choice with unmatched burst potential.

Tier: S PvP: 9/10 PvE: 7/10 Rarity: Legendary

The World Core Statistics

Damage 10/10
Sustain 4/10
PvP Score 9/10
PvE Score 7/10
Mobility 6/10

How to Get The World

Stand Arrow (Legendary rarity, ~5% chance).

Tier Ranking

S-Tier in the Bizarre Lineage tier list. View full tier list →

Pro Tips for The World

  • Vampire style provides sustain that compensates for The World's low survival
  • Knife Throw during Time Stop is the classic combo
  • Can be evolved into The World: High Voltage with a Holy Corpse Part

Best Build for The World in Bizarre Lineage

Best Fighting Style: Vampirism

Provides high sustain and ranged pressure through life steal and blood-based attacks. The best defensive fighting style, but vulnerable to Hamon users.

View Style Guide →

The World Full Moveset — All Abilities

E

MUDA Barrage

6s

A rapid barrage of punches dealing heavy damage.

R

Heavy Punch

8s

A devastating single punch with knockback.

Z

Time Stop

45s

Freeze time for nearby players.

X

Road Roller

60s

Drop a road roller for massive AoE damage.

C

Knife Throw

3s

Throw knives at range during Time Stop.

V

Stand Jump

5s

Leap into the air for mobility.

The World FAQ — Bizarre Lineage

Is The World good in Bizarre Lineage?

The World is a S-tier Stand in Bizarre Lineage with a PvP score of 9/10 and PvE score of 7/10. DIO's iconic Stand. Time Stop combined with raw destructive power makes it a top-tier PvP choice with unmatched burst potential.

How do I get The World in Bizarre Lineage?

In Bizarre Lineage, The World can be obtained by: Stand Arrow (Legendary rarity, ~5% chance).. As a Legendary rarity Stand, it has approximately a 5% chance from Stand Arrows. Use Bizarre Lineage codes to get free Stand Arrows and increase your chances.

What is the best fighting style for The World in Bizarre Lineage?

The recommended fighting style for The World in Bizarre Lineage is Vampirism. Provides high sustain and ranged pressure through life steal and blood-based attacks. The best defensive fighting style, but vulnerable to Hamon users.

What are The World's best abilities in Bizarre Lineage?

The World has 6 abilities in Bizarre Lineage. Vampire style provides sustain that compensates for The World's low survival See the full moveset breakdown above.
